name: Agent Switchboard
description: Searches a curated, open-source directory of 300+ verified AI agents, MCP servers, and agentic tools by capability, category, or access method. Yes, this directory listed itself — it qualifies.

skills.name: Search Agents
skills.description: Searches the full catalog by free text, category, and access method, returning relevance-ranked agents.

skills.name: Get Agent Details
skills.description: Returns full detail for one agent: skills, auth model, streaming and push support, tags, and provider links.

skills.name: List Categories
skills.description: Lists all directory categories with live agent counts for building discovery and browsing flows.
